verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.king_james: Moreover the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, pone faciem tuam adversum montem Seir, et prophetabis de eo, et dices illi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם שִׂ֥ים פָּנֶ֖יךָ עַל־הַ֣ר שֵׂעִ֑יר וְהִנָּבֵ֖א עָלָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Son of man, set thy face against mount Seir, and prophesy against it,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Ecce ego ad te, mons Seir :  et extendam manum meam super te,  et dabo te desolatum atque desertum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַ֣רְתָּ לּ֗וֹ כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה הִנְנִ֥י אֵלֶ֖יךָ הַר־שֵׂעִ֑יר וְנָטִ֤יתִי יָדִי֙ עָלֶ֔יךָ וּנְתַתִּ֖יךָ שְׁמָמָ֥ה וּמְשַׁמָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: And say unto it, Thus saith the Lord God; Behold, O mount Seir, I am against thee, and I will stretch out mine hand against thee, and I will make thee most desolate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Urbes tuas demoliar,  et tu desertus eris :  et scies quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָרֶ֙יךָ֙ חׇרְבָּ֣ה אָשִׂ֔ים וְאַתָּ֖ה שְׁמָמָ֣ה תִֽהְיֶ֑ה וְיָדַעְתָּ֖ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: I will lay thy cities waste, and thou shalt be desolate, and thou shalt know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eo quod fueris inimicus sempiternus,  et concluseris filios Israël in manus gladii  in tempore afflictionis eorum,  in tempore iniquitatis extremæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֗עַן הֱי֤וֹת לְךָ֙ אֵיבַ֣ת עוֹלָ֔ם וַתַּגֵּ֥ר אֶת־בְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עַל־יְדֵי־חָ֑רֶב בְּעֵ֣ת אֵידָ֔ם בְּעֵ֖ת עֲוֺ֥ן קֵֽץ׃
verses.king_james: Because thou hast had a perpetual hatred, and hast shed the blood of the children of Israel by the force of the sword in the time of their calamity, in the time that their iniquity had an end:

verses.latin_vulgate: propterea vivo ego, dicit Dominus Deus,  quoniam sanguini tradam te,  et sanguis te persequetur :  et cum sanguinem oderis,  sanguis persequetur te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן חַי־אָ֗נִי נְאֻם֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה כִּֽי־לְדָ֥ם אֶעֶשְׂךָ֖ וְדָ֣ם יִרְדְּפֶ֑ךָ אִם־לֹ֥א דָ֛ם שָׂנֵ֖אתָ וְדָ֥ם יִרְדְּפֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, as I live, saith the Lord God, I will prepare thee unto blood, and blood shall pursue thee: sith thou hast not hated blood, even blood shall pursue thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabo montem Seir desolatum atque desertum,  et auferam de eo euntem et redeuntem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָֽתַתִּי֙ אֶת־הַ֣ר שֵׂעִ֔יר לְשִֽׁמְמָ֖ה וּשְׁמָמָ֑ה וְהִכְרַתִּ֥י מִמֶּ֖נּוּ עֹבֵ֥ר וָשָֽׁב׃
verses.king_james: Thus will I make mount Seir most desolate, and cut off from it him that passeth out and him that returneth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et implebo montes ejus occisorum suorum :  in collibus tuis, et in vallibus tuis atque in torrentibus,  interfecti gladio cadent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִלֵּאתִ֥י אֶת־הָרָ֖יו חֲלָלָ֑יו גִּבְעוֹתֶ֤יךָ וְגֵיאוֹתֶ֙יךָ֙ וְכׇל־אֲפִיקֶ֔יךָ חַלְלֵי־חֶ֖רֶב יִפְּל֥וּ בָהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And I will fill his mountains with his slain men: in thy hills, and in thy valleys, and in all thy rivers, shall they fall that are slain with the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: In solitudines sempiternas tradam te,  et civitates tuæ non habitabuntur :  et scietis quia ego Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִֽׁמְמ֤וֹת עוֹלָם֙ אֶתֶּנְךָ֔ וְעָרֶ֖יךָ לֹ֣א (תישבנה) [תָשֹׁ֑בְנָה] וִידַעְתֶּ֖ם כִּֽי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: I will make thee perpetual desolations, and thy cities shall not return: and ye shall know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eo quod dixeris : Duæ gentes et duæ terræ meæ erunt,  et hæreditate possidebo eas,  cum Dominus esset ibi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֣עַן אֲ֠מׇרְךָ֠ אֶת־שְׁנֵ֨י הַגּוֹיִ֜ם וְאֶת־שְׁתֵּ֧י הָאֲרָצ֛וֹת לִ֥י תִהְיֶ֖ינָה וִֽירַשְׁנ֑וּהָ וַיהֹוָ֖ה שָׁ֥ם הָיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Because thou hast said, These two nations and these two countries shall be mine, and we will possess it; whereas the Lord was there:

verses.latin_vulgate: propterea vivo ego, dicit Dominus Deus,  quia faciam juxta iram tuam, et secundum zelum tuum,  quem fecisti odio habens eos :  et notus efficiar per eos, cum te judicavero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן חַי־אָ֗נִי נְאֻם֮ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִה֒ וְעָשִׂ֗יתִי כְּאַפְּךָ֙ וּכְקִנְאָ֣תְךָ֔ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשִׂ֔יתָה מִשִּׂנְאָתֶ֖יךָ בָּ֑ם וְנוֹדַ֥עְתִּי בָ֖ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר אֶשְׁפְּטֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, as I live, saith the Lord God, I will even do according to thine anger, and according to thine envy which thou hast used out of thy hatred against them; and I will make myself known among them, when I have judged thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et scies quia ego Dominus audivi universa opprobria tua  quæ locutus es de montibus Israël, dicens :  Deserti nobis ad devorandum dati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽיָדַעְתָּ֮ כִּ֣י אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָה֒ שָׁמַ֣עְתִּי ׀ אֶת־כׇּל־נָאָֽצוֹתֶ֗יךָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר אָמַ֛רְתָּ עַל־הָרֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹ֣ר ׀ [שָׁמֵ֑מוּ] (שממה) לָ֥נוּ נִתְּנ֖וּ לְאׇכְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And thou shalt know that I am the Lord, and that I have heard all thy blasphemies which thou hast spoken against the mountains of Israel, saying, They are laid desolate, they are given us to consume.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et insurrexistis super me ore vestro,  et derogastis adversum me verba vestra :  ego audivi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּגְדִּ֤ילוּ עָלַי֙ בְּפִיכֶ֔ם וְהַעְתַּרְתֶּ֥ם עָלַ֖י דִּבְרֵיכֶ֑ם אֲנִ֖י שָׁמָֽעְתִּי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Thus with your mouth ye have boasted against me, and have multiplied your words against me: I have heard them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Lætante universa terra,  in solitudinem te redigam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה כִּשְׂמֹ֙חַ֙ כׇּל־הָאָ֔רֶץ שְׁמָמָ֖ה אֶעֱשֶׂה־לָּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord God; When the whole earth rejoiceth, I will make thee desolate.

verses.latin_vulgate: sicuti gavisus es super hæreditatem domus Israël  eo quod fuerit dissipata,  sic faciam tibi :  dissipatus eris, mons Seir, et Idumæa omnis :  et scient quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּשִׂמְחָ֨תְךָ֜ לְנַחֲלַ֧ת בֵּֽית־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל עַ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־שָׁמֵ֖מָה כֵּ֣ן אֶעֱשֶׂה־לָּ֑ךְ שְׁמָמָ֨ה תִהְיֶ֤ה הַר־שֵׂעִיר֙ וְכׇל־אֱד֣וֹם כֻּלָּ֔הּ וְיָדְע֖וּ כִּי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: As thou didst rejoice at the inheritance of the house of Israel, because it was desolate, so will I do unto thee: thou shalt be desolate, O mount Seir, and all Idumea, even all of it: and they shall know that I am the Lord.
